signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M (Week Ending April 11, 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP saw $119.6 million in net inflows to investment products, the strongest weekly figure since December, with seven spot XRP ETFs nearing $1 billion in assets under management[4]. This follows SEC/CFTC classification of XRP as a digital commodity in March and builds on post-SEC vs. Ripple legal clarity attracting

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Banking Committee Markup (Late April 2026) | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Banking Committee Markup (Late April 2026) | YES | MED confidence**  
The CLARITY Act, potentially allowing banks to use XRP for liquidity, advances toward a late-April Senate vote with endorsements from Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent[3][4]. XRP holds above $1.30 support amid this regulatory progress, trading at $1.33–$1.44[1][2][3].
